script_to_test_coverage_summary.details: Design maps stubs one-to-one but uses tests/ instead of scripts/test/.

findings.summary: Missing reference.md content contracts for newly created skills
findings.recommended_fix: Add explicit reference.md content requirements for both new skills: invariants, schemas, path conventions, validation commands, failure/recovery rules.

findings.summary: Script-bearing package uses tests/ instead of required scripts/test/ layout
findings.recommended_fix: Move test plan and stubs under workspace-daily/skills/rca-orchestrator/scripts/test/ and update all references.

findings.summary: Phase 0 non-regression contract is not preserved
findings.recommended_fix: Define stop-and-choose behavior for non-fresh states or document additive semantic change with explicit compatibility rationale.

findings.summary: Phase 3 completion ownership conflicts with run.sh phase progression
findings.recommended_fix: Choose one gating model so phase 4 starts only after phase 3 completion is deterministically recorded.

findings.summary: Publish status model references partial_success but phase logic cannot produce it
findings.recommended_fix: Either implement partial_success transitions in phase 4 or remove partial_success from summaries/schema.

findings.summary: Jira publish target and mechanism are contradictory across sections
findings.recommended_fix: Align all sections to one field target and one publishing mechanism.
Add explicit reviewer artifact paths and final reviewer status output contract.

findings.summary: Spawn template uses ambiguous dual skill path
findings.recommended_fix: Use one canonical repository-relative skill path.
